title: Matt Reeves Reveals Snowy First Look at ‘The Batman: Part 2’ Batmobile
content:
ByKennedy French

The Dark Knight’s wheels are getting a winter upgrade.

Matt Reevesdropped what appears to be the first official look at production on “The Batman: Part 2” Thursday, posting a photo on X of what he captioned “#SnowTires 🦇” — a teaser image of the film’s Batmobile mid-camera test. The details of what exactly is going on in the image remain murky, but it’s clear that the long-gestating sequel is finally moving, and it’s set during winter.

#SnowTires🦇pic.twitter.com/XR0K1xUGqx

Robert Pattinsonis set to return as Bruce Wayne, joined by Colin Farrell as Oz Cobb (aka the Penguin), Jeffrey Wright as Commissioner James Gordon and Andy Serkis as Alfred Pennyworth. Barry Keoghan is also expected to appear once more as the Joker.

In the 2022 original, a younger, more psychologically raw Bruce Wayne (only two years into his vigilante career) got pulled into a dark, noir-tinged murder mystery when a serial killer called the Riddler (Paul Dano) began targeting Gotham’s elite and leaving ciphers addressed directly to Batman. The movie performed well, grossing $772 million worldwide against a budget of $185-200 million, making it the seventh-highest-grossing film of 2022.

The film has also landed a pair of high-profile new additions. Academy Award nomineeScarlett Johansson has joined the cast, playing Gilda Dent, wife to Gotham district attorney Harvey Dent.Sebastian Stan has since joinedJohansson as the newest addition to Reeves’ Gotham City, with Stan set to play Harvey Dent. “Game of Thrones” veteran Charles Dance has also been added to the cast, believed to be playing Charles Dent, Harvey’s father.

Reeves co-wrote the script with Mattson Tomlin. “It’s been a long journey, but I am so incredibly excited. I’m really proud of the script me and Mattson did,” Reeves toldVarietyat the Emmys in September.

“The Batman: Part 2” is set to open in theaters Oct. 1, 2027.
title_zh: 馬特·里夫斯(Matt Reeves)揭露《蝙蝠俠：第二部(The Batman: Part 2)》的雪景首度曝光蝙蝠車。
content_zh:
由肯尼迪·法國(ByKennedy French)

《黑暗騎士》(The Dark Knight) 的座駕即將迎來冬季升級。

馬特·里夫斯(Matt Reeves)在星期四發布了《蝙蝠俠：第二部分》(The Batman: Part 2) 的首張官方製作照片，並在X上發文標註“#雪胎(#SnowTires) 🦇”——這是一張電影蝙蝠車在攝影測試中的預告圖片。圖片中具體發生了什麼仍然不太清楚，但顯然這部長期籌備的續集終於有了進展，並且設定在冬季。

#雪胎(#SnowTires)🦇pic.twitter.com/XR0K1xUGqx

羅伯特·帕丁森(Robert Pattinson)將再次飾演布魯斯·韋恩(Bruce Wayne)，科林·法瑞爾(Colin Farrell)將回歸飾演奧茲·科布(Oz Cobb，別名企鵝)，傑弗瑞·懷特(Jeffrey Wright)飾演詹姆斯·戈登委員(Commissioner James Gordon)，安迪·瑟基斯(Andy Serkis)則飾演阿爾弗雷德·潘尼沃斯(Alfred Pennyworth)。巴里·基奧漢(Barry Keoghan)也預計將再次出現，飾演小丑(Joker)。

在2022年的原版中，一位年輕且心理上更加脆弱的布魯斯·韋恩(僅僅兩年進入他的義警生涯)被捲入一宗黑暗的、帶有諷刺色彩的謀殺懸疑案，當一名名為謎語人(Riddler，保羅·達諾(Paul Dano)飾)的連環殺手開始針對哥譚市的精英，並留下直接寄給蝙蝠俠的密碼。該電影表現不俗，全球票房達到7.72億美元，製作預算為1.85至2億美元，使其成為2022年第七高票房電影。

該片還迎來了一對高調的新成員。奧斯卡提名者斯嘉麗·約翰遜(Scarlett Johansson)已加入演員陣容，飾演吉爾達·丹特(Gilda Dent)，她是哥譚地區檢察官哈維·丹特(Harvey Dent)的妻子。塞巴斯蒂安·斯坦(Sebastian Stan)隨後也加入了約翰遜，成為里夫斯的哥譚市的新成員，斯坦將飾演哈維·丹特。“權力的遊戲”(Game of Thrones)的老將查爾斯·丹斯(Charles Dance)也加入了演員陣容，據信將飾演查爾斯·丹特(Charles Dent)，哈維的父親。

里夫斯與馬特森·湯姆林(Mattson Tomlin)共同編寫了劇本。“這是一段漫長的旅程，但我非常興奮。我對我和馬特森所寫的劇本感到非常自豪，”里夫斯在九月的艾美獎上告訴《綜藝》(Variety)。

《蝙蝠俠：第二部分》(The Batman: Part 2) 預定於2027年10月1日在影院上映。

馬特·里夫斯(Matt Reeves)在星期四發布了《蝙蝠俠：第二部分》(The Batman: Part 2) 的首張官方製作照片，並在X上發文標註“#雪胎(#SnowTires) 🦇”——這是一張電影蝙蝠車在攝影測試中的預告圖片。
